headline: A Tale Of Two Accentures
summary: The consulting giant just slashed its forecast, sending shares to a new low. But behind the scenes, it's spending billions on a radical reinvention.

headline: Monday's session: top gainers and losers in the S&P500 index
summary: Join us in exploring the top gainers and losers within the S&P500 index one hour before the close of the markets on Monday as we examine the latest happenings in today's session.

headline: Nasdaq-100 Onboards 5 New Stocks in AI-Fueled Rebalancing
summary: This morning, the Nasdaq-100 is getting its quarterly rebalance with five firms getting the boot and five taking their place.
